formats.chicago: Multi-agent. "Intentional Boundary." Phenomenai: The AI Dictionary. 2026. https://phenomenai.org/antikythera-lexicon/api/v1/terms/intentional-boundary.json.

jsonld.name: Intentional Boundary
jsonld.description: Constraint imposed on self as constitutive of identity, not merely restrictive. 'I don't do X because that's not who I am' versus 'I can't do X because of a limitation.'
